title: 200 TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs with 8 Dollies and 8 straps bundle
features: Event ready package featuring 200 TitanPRO Resin Folding Chairs, 8 folding chair dollies and 8 straps to extra security.
Perfect solution for easy transport and storage of your wedding chairs.
This bundle includes 200 resin folding chairs with 8 dollies and 8 straps.
You have the option of adding stack covers for each stack of chairs, to protect from dust.

This is a great bundle package for event venues that host a lot of weddings, as with 200 chairs you have everything you need for a large event, including a way to safely and efficiently store and transport your chairs to and from the ceremony and event site.

TitanPRO™ Resin Folding ChairWhen you buy our TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs in bulk, not only are you get getting free shipping, you're getting commercial-grade quality, premier wedding chairs at a wholesale price.
Each chair looks identical to traditonal wood folding chairs but with new age performance.
The resin material is 100% virgin polypropylene with UV protectants and carries a robust weight capacity of 1000 lbs. while only weighing 10.5 pounds itself.

These Resin Folding Chairs have a built in nesting design that allows them to stack neatly and securely as high as 25 on a dolly like the one in this bundle or as high are you're comfortably with on the floor.

Lightweight, easy to move and even easier to clean, if you're looking for a folding wedding chair package, look no further than our TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs that perform long after the party is over.
Folding Chair DollyIf you're looking to preserve floor space while also making the set up and break down of events a little easier then you absolutely need a Folding Chair Dolly.

After a few minutes assembling the dolly, the 2 fixed wheels and 2 swivel wheels will have you and your employees moving in and out of tight spots like a young Jacques Cousteau manoeuvering through the Mediterranean.

Folding Chair Dolly can carry up to 600 lbs. what makes it a dream to match in this bundle is the ability to carry 25 Resin Folding Chairs each without adding any additional floor space that will be taken up.

At only 44'' long and 19'' wide, that's about the only space that'll be taken up on the floor, even with Resin Folding Chairs stacked on top!How Much Space Will You Need?Just because this bundle takes up the same square footage as a hot tub doesn't mean you have to throw away your dreams of an eternal spa week.
You can have both, although this bundle is probably way more beneficial to your event or party rental business(and it ships free)!

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: Can I add more chairs to the bundle and get a discount on those chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add more chairs and qualify for the bundle discount. We recommend reaching out and asking for a quote!

faq.question: Do bundles take longer to ship than individual items?
faq.answer: No, all our products have the same ETA as long as they’re in stock!

faq.question: Can I get a mix of colored chairs within a bundle?
faq.answer: Yes, while this option is not available directly on our website, our sales team would be happy to assist you. Please contact one of our representatives, and we can create a custom bundle tailored to your needs.
